title: [IGNORE] [backport release-1.18] TMT for system tests and automatic `release` label on release- branch PRs.

comments.body: Looks like this needs to be accompanied by a `.github/workflows/labeler.yml` to actually run the action per the label as in https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/.github/workflows/labeler.yml . Fixing on main first.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
